title: Open-source preprocessing and representative-cell selection code for CALCE LiCoO2/graphite V-SoC calibration
description: This repository contains the preprocessing, consistency-check, representative-cell selection, statistical-analysis, sparse gated correction, and isotonic LUT construction code used for condition-aware V-SoC calibration of the CALCE LiCoO2/graphite battery dataset.

creators.name: Biçer, Emre
creators.affiliation: Sivas University of Science and Technology
